fields.label: How this works
fields.message: Precedence: background image (if set) wins, then gradient (CSS), then solid colour. If all are empty, the theme uses the default navy footer. A background image replaces the built‑in blue fill and usually includes your curved top edge in the asset.

fields.label: Background image
fields.name: footer_background_image
fields.instructions: Full‑width footer artwork (PNG/WebP/JPEG/SVG). Covers the main footer block; use the largest export for crisp edges.

fields.label: Background colour (hex)
fields.name: footer_background_color
fields.instructions: Example: #002752. Used only when no background image is set. Overrides default navy when gradient is also empty.

fields.label: Background gradient (CSS)
fields.name: footer_background_gradient
fields.instructions: Full CSS background-image value, e.g. linear-gradient(180deg, #002752 0%, #001428 100%). Used when no background image is set; takes precedence over the colour field.

fields.label: Text under the buttons
fields.name: footer_cta_text
fields.instructions: Small line of copy under the two CTA buttons. Main headline and paragraph use “Footer Content” above.

fields.label: Hide primary menu
fields.name: hide_site_navigation
fields.instructions: When enabled, the header menu links (Home, About, etc.) are hidden on this page. Logo, language switcher, and CTA stay visible.

fields.label: Blog archive page
fields.name: is_blog_archive
fields.instructions: When enabled, URL query parameters ?page= (pagination) and ?s= (search) apply to the Blog post overview section on this page.

fields.label: Case study archive page
fields.name: is_case_study_archive
fields.instructions: When enabled, URL query parameters ?page= (pagination) and ?s= (search) apply to the Case study overview section on this page.

fields.label: Page Sections
fields.name: page_sections
fields.instructions: Add, order, and configure page sections.

sub_fields.label: Offer Text
sub_fields.name: offer_text
sub_fields.instructions: Short offer line under the intro, for example pricing or urgency.

sub_fields.label: Trust Image
sub_fields.name: trust_image
sub_fields.instructions: Small trust row text, for example review summary or social proof.

sub_fields.label: Behind image
sub_fields.name: behind_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional layer behind the main hero figure (e.g. app screenshot). With a main hero image, it sits on the right half; with only this layer (no main image), the layout uses 40% width on the right.

sub_fields.label: Behind image — right padding
sub_fields.name: behind_image_right_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Optional extra space (pixels) on the right inside the behind-image band. Leave empty or 0 for the default (no extra padding).

sub_fields.label: Tagline
sub_fields.name: tagline
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small line under the eyebrow (e.g. "We are Salonora"). Leave blank to hide.

sub_fields.label: Floating card
sub_fields.name: floating_card
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small overlay card next to the image (e.g. "From €10 per month, live immediately!"). Leave blank to hide.

sub_fields.label: Variant
sub_fields.name: variant
sub_fields.instructions: Layout density. "Default" keeps the existing full-height hero. "Compact" uses lower top padding and a slightly smaller headline (e.g. About-style intros).

sub_fields.label: Offer text size
sub_fields.name: offer_text_size
sub_fields.instructions: Responsive size for the Offer Text line. "Large" matches the homepage (lg: 36px). "Medium" (lg: 30px) and "Small" (lg: 24px) suit inner pages.

sub_fields.label: Comparison card — header line
sub_fields.name: loss_card_title
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. “Wekelijkse verliezen zonder Salonora” (above the loss rows).

sub_fields.label: Loss Items
sub_fields.name: loss_items
sub_fields.instructions: Optional bullet or checklist items.

sub_fields.label: List item icon (default)
sub_fields.name: list_default_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Applied to each point unless the row overrides with its own Icon. Prefer PNG/WebP/SVG exported from design.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Overrides list default icon for this row.

sub_fields.label: Download button trailing icon
sub_fields.name: cta_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Shows at the right of the download pill (exact export from Figma/SVG preferred). PNG/WebP transparent also works.

sub_fields.label: Visual column position
sub_fields.name: media_position
sub_fields.instructions: Desktop: visual column on the left or right of the copy.

sub_fields.label: Intro
sub_fields.name: intro
sub_fields.instructions: Opening paragraphs under the title.

sub_fields.label: Upcoming section heading
sub_fields.name: upcoming_heading
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. “Binnenkort beschikbaar”

sub_fields.label: Upcoming list icon (default)
sub_fields.name: list_default_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Check-style icon for each upcoming row unless the row overrides.

sub_fields.label: Icon override
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; falls back to default list icon.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Long supporting paragraph before the highlight line.

sub_fields.label: Highlight line
sub_fields.name: highlight_line
sub_fields.instructions: Bold line above the CTA (e.g. “En misschien ben jij de volgende!”).

sub_fields.label: Decorative panel (behind card)
sub_fields.name: decorative_panel
sub_fields.instructions: Optional angled/large shape behind the main visual (PNG/WebP/SVG).

sub_fields.label: Main visual (dashboard card)
sub_fields.name: main_visual
sub_fields.instructions: Primary screenshot or illustration for the left collage.

sub_fields.label: Floating circle images
sub_fields.name: floating_circles
sub_fields.instructions: Usually three circular crops around the main visual.

sub_fields.label: CTAs
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: First row is used for the primary pill button.

sub_fields.label: CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: cta_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Icon inside the circle at the right of the button (e.g. arrow).

sub_fields.label: Headline
sub_fields.name: headline
sub_fields.instructions: Centered white headline; use Shift+Enter for a second line.

sub_fields.label: White pill text
sub_fields.name: badge_text
sub_fields.instructions: Label in the white pill (e.g. Rubin & Didi). Use “Pill link” below only if the pill should navigate somewhere.

sub_fields.label: Pill link (optional)
sub_fields.name: pill_link
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty for a static badge. When set, the pill keeps the same look but acts as a link.

sub_fields.label: Left portrait
sub_fields.name: left_image
sub_fields.instructions: Cutout / PNG with transparency recommended; anchored bottom-left.

sub_fields.label: Right portrait
sub_fields.name: right_image
sub_fields.instructions: Cutout / PNG with transparency recommended; anchored bottom-right.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Centered section heading (e.g. “Voor Wie Zijn Wij Er?”).

sub_fields.label: Audience items
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: Each pill: icon in a colored tile + label. Use Brand (blue) or Rose (pink) for the tile to match the design alternation.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Square or transparent PNG/SVG; displayed inside the rounded tile.

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: Name under the icon; use Shift+Enter for a second line when needed.

sub_fields.label: Icon tile color
sub_fields.name: icon_accent
sub_fields.instructions: Brand = blue tile; Rose = pink tile (Figma alternation).

sub_fields.label: Optional CTA
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button below the row; first row only is shown.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading (Figma **1325:38**).

sub_fields.label: Subtitle
sub_fields.name: subtitle
sub_fields.instructions: Line under the title (e.g. “Dit is voor jou als je:”).

sub_fields.label: Default checklist icon
sub_fields.name: list_default_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; rows without a per-row icon inherit this. Empty = built-in brand check.

sub_fields.label: Checklist
sub_fields.name: checklist
sub_fields.instructions: Bullet lines with optional per-row icon.

sub_fields.label: Footer note
sub_fields.name: footer_note
sub_fields.instructions: Paragraph below the checklist (e.g. “Dit werkt ook voor…”).

sub_fields.label: CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: button_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional graphic after the CTA label (e.g. arrow); shown inverted on the brand pill.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Right column photo; rotated brand panel is rendered in the theme.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Centered headline over the navy band (Figma 597:4037).

sub_fields.label: Intro
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Intro paragraphs below the title.

sub_fields.label: Default checklist icon
sub_fields.name: list_default_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; rows without a per-row icon inherit this. Empty = built-in brand check.

sub_fields.label: Checklist
sub_fields.name: checklist
sub_fields.instructions: Left column white cards.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Right column visual (rounded).

sub_fields.label: CTA
sub_fields.name: button
sub_fields.instructions: Primary button over the image (e.g. Start vandaag).

sub_fields.label: CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: button_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; replaces the default circled arrow.

sub_fields.label: Visual column position
sub_fields.name: media_position
sub_fields.instructions: Desktop: media column on the left or right. Mobile: media stacks above copy.

sub_fields.label: Card style
sub_fields.name: panel_style
sub_fields.instructions: Soft blue = pale surface card (Figma 597:3503). White card = bordered white panel (mirror variant).

sub_fields.label: Top image
sub_fields.name: image_top
sub_fields.instructions: Primary photo (rounded).

sub_fields.label: Bottom graphic
sub_fields.name: image_bottom
sub_fields.instructions: Mockup / secondary visual inside the inner framed area.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Intro paragraphs below the subtitle.

sub_fields.label: Default checklist icon
sub_fields.name: list_default_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Applied to every checklist row that has no per-row icon. Leave empty to use the built-in brand check icon.

sub_fields.label: Checklist
sub_fields.name: checklist
sub_fields.instructions: One row per bullet. Per-row icon overrides the default; both empty falls back to the built-in brand check.

sub_fields.label: Icon (optional)
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Square or transparent PNG/SVG. Leave empty to inherit the section default or built-in brand check.

sub_fields.label: Testimonial heading (optional)
sub_fields.name: testimonial_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Bold line above the testimonial body (e.g. “Melanie Koelemeijer van Voetzorg Roermond ging je voor!”). Leave all testimonial fields empty to hide the block.

sub_fields.label: Testimonial body (optional)
sub_fields.name: testimonial_body
sub_fields.instructions: Quote / paragraph rendered between the heading and the author row.

sub_fields.label: Testimonial author image (optional)
sub_fields.name: testimonial_author_image
sub_fields.instructions: Small round avatar shown next to the author name.

sub_fields.label: Testimonial author role / company (optional)
sub_fields.name: testimonial_author_role
sub_fields.instructions: Shown under the author name (e.g. “Voetzorg Roermond”).

sub_fields.label: Pricing / highlight line
sub_fields.name: pricing_label
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. “Vanaf €10 per maand. Direct live!”

sub_fields.label: Button trailing icon
sub_fields.name: button_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional icon on the right of the pill (e.g. arrow in circle). Leave empty to use the default circled arrow.

sub_fields.label: Badge text
sub_fields.name: badge_text
sub_fields.instructions: Optional pill above the headline (e.g. audience segment).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for multi-line headings.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Intro paragraph under the title.

sub_fields.label: Feature lines
sub_fields.name: features
sub_fields.instructions: Checklist rows (brand check icon is built in).

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Main photo (rounded); optional tilted brand panel renders behind when set.

sub_fields.label: White panel shadow
sub_fields.name: show_card_shadow
sub_fields.instructions: When enabled, applies the soft drop shadow around the white card panel (Figma elevation).

sub_fields.label: CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: button_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; replaces the default circled arrow.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading (line breaks allowed).

sub_fields.label: Steps
sub_fields.name: steps
sub_fields.instructions: Up to three process steps with numbered tiles.

sub_fields.label: Number
sub_fields.name: number
sub_fields.instructions: Shown in the square (e.g. 1, 2, 3).

sub_fields.label: Icon color
sub_fields.name: icon_color
sub_fields.instructions: Blue matches brand; pink alternates for the middle step in the default design.

sub_fields.label: CTA link
sub_fields.name: cta_link
sub_fields.instructions: Primary pill button under the steps.

sub_fields.label: Browser screenshot
sub_fields.name: browser_image
sub_fields.instructions: Shown inside the decorative browser frame (site preview).

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Featured image; optional brand shape appears behind when enabled below.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for multi-line headings.

sub_fields.label: CTA
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: Add one row. Use “CTA URL” (link) for both destination and button label (link title). The first row is shown on the page.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Left-side cutout/portrait. Prefer a PNG/WebP with transparent background so it can sit on the tilted brand panel.

sub_fields.label: Background graphic
sub_fields.name: background_graphic
sub_fields.instructions: Optional full-panel decorative overlay (e.g. the diagonal pattern from Figma). Upload a transparent PNG/SVG export sized for the whole panel.

sub_fields.label: Behind graphic
sub_fields.name: behind_graphic
sub_fields.instructions: Optional decorative graphic behind the person (Figma background layer). Upload a transparent PNG/SVG export.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small pill label above the title (Figma example: “Waarom Wij Dit Doen”).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main headline (Figma example: “Het begon met frustratie”).

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Main paragraph text (Figma example: “Ik ben Rubin Koot…”).

sub_fields.label: Highlight line
sub_fields.name: highlight_line
sub_fields.instructions: Bold emphasis line under the paragraph (Figma example: “Daar zag ik iets wat me niet lekker zat!”).

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small pill label above the title (Figma example: “Waar Het Allemaal Mee Begon”).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main headline (supports line breaks).

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Main paragraph text.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Right-side photo (shown inside a rounded mask, with a tilted brand panel behind).

sub_fields.label: CTA
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Add one row. Use “CTA URL” (link) for both destination and button label (link title). The first row is shown on the page.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Centered section heading (line breaks allowed). Figma: “Onze Beloftes aan Jou!”.

sub_fields.label: Promises
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: Typically four columns: icon in a brand (blue) or rose circle, title, and short description.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: White or light artwork on transparency works best on the colored circle.

sub_fields.label: Icon circle color
sub_fields.name: icon_accent
sub_fields.instructions: Brand = blue circle; Rose = pink circle (alternate per column in the design).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Bold line under the icon.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Supporting copy under the title.

sub_fields.label: Avatar
sub_fields.name: avatar
sub_fields.instructions: Small square image next to the title (Figma ~62×62).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading beside the avatar (line breaks allowed).

sub_fields.label: Subtitle
sub_fields.name: subtitle
sub_fields.instructions: Accent line under the title row (e.g. Van Kapper naar Marketeer).

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Body copy inside the gradient card.

sub_fields.label: Conclusion
sub_fields.name: conclusion
sub_fields.instructions: Closing emphasis line below the body.

sub_fields.label: Main image
sub_fields.name: main_image
sub_fields.instructions: Large portrait on the right (rounded mask + tilted brand panel per Figma).

sub_fields.label: Left panel title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Headline on the blue gradient card (line breaks allowed). Figma 1090:47.

sub_fields.label: Left panel rows
sub_fields.name: left_rows
sub_fields.instructions: Portrait + expertise copy for each row (e.g. two founders).

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Square portrait (~124×124 display).

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Expertise line next to the portrait.

sub_fields.label: Story cards
sub_fields.name: content_cards
sub_fields.instructions: Three stacked cards on the right column.

sub_fields.label: Top/bottom accent
sub_fields.name: accent
sub_fields.instructions: Thin colored lines on the top and bottom of the card (reference: blue / pink). Leave default to alternate automatically.

sub_fields.label: Footer logo
sub_fields.name: footer_logo
sub_fields.instructions: Brand mark in the bottom gradient strip.

sub_fields.label: Footer text
sub_fields.name: footer_text
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. Dat is Salonora geworden!

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Headline (line breaks allowed). Example: Ik had iemand nodig die / het vak kent.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Main paragraph on the light blue panel.

sub_fields.label: Highlight line
sub_fields.name: highlight_line
sub_fields.instructions: Short line below the divider (shown in brand blue).

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Duo or team photo (cutout) on the navy half. Optional decorative arc is rendered in code.

sub_fields.label: CTAs
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. First row is shown.

sub_fields.label: Left image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Illustration or graphic for the left column.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Short label above the title (e.g. pill text).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for multi-line headings.

sub_fields.label: Intro
sub_fields.name: intro
sub_fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph under the title.

sub_fields.label: Image + text rows
sub_fields.name: image_text_rows
sub_fields.instructions: Optional rows below the divider: small icon and emphasis text.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Pill label above the title (e.g. Wij zijn meer).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for multi-line headings.

sub_fields.label: Intro
sub_fields.name: intro
sub_fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph next to the visual.

sub_fields.label: Panel visual
sub_fields.name: visual_image
sub_fields.instructions: Composite image for the blue gradient panel (people + UI), wide aspect (~16:9).

sub_fields.label: Feature cards
sub_fields.name: feature_cards
sub_fields.instructions: Up to three cards with accent colour, icon, title and text.

sub_fields.label: Accent
sub_fields.name: accent
sub_fields.instructions: Blue matches brand; rose for the middle card style.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Square icon on coloured tile.

sub_fields.label: Footer title
sub_fields.name: footer_title
sub_fields.instructions: Optional line above the footer CTA when “Panel visual” is empty (centered layout, e.g. Figma 597:2910).

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA link

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA icon

sub_fields.name: eyebrow

sub_fields.name: ctas

sub_fields.label: Items per slide
sub_fields.name: items_per_view
sub_fields.instructions: How many testimonial cards appear side-by-side on larger screens (mobile stacks within each slide). Carousel dots appear when there is more than one slide.

sub_fields.label: Items
sub_fields.name: items
sub_fields.instructions: Short phrases shown in the tilted ticker (star icon appears before each).

sub_fields.label: Badge
sub_fields.name: badge
sub_fields.instructions: Small pill above the heading (e.g. “In drie stappen online”).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for multi-line headings.

sub_fields.name: steps

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Prefer PNG/SVG on transparent background (shown white on tile).

sub_fields.label: Footer tagline
sub_fields.name: footer_tagline
sub_fields.instructions: Single line of highlights (e.g. separated by “|”).

sub_fields.label: Badge
sub_fields.name: badge
sub_fields.instructions: Pill label above the headline (e.g. Wat je ziet in de demo).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main heading (line breaks allowed).

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: All paragraphs below the headline. Use bold for lead phrases (e.g. each “Hoe …” line), like other WYSIWYG sections.

sub_fields.label: Mockup image
sub_fields.name: mockup_image
sub_fields.instructions: Laptop or product screenshot (right column).

sub_fields.label: Intro line
sub_fields.name: intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional subtitle row (e.g. phrases separated by arrows).

sub_fields.label: White section background
sub_fields.name: white_background
sub_fields.instructions: Adds a full-width white band behind this section (cards remain white with shadow).

sub_fields.label: Number of rows
sub_fields.name: grid_rows
sub_fields.instructions: How many horizontal rows of cards. Total services loaded = rows × columns (newest first). Need more than 99 rows? Add another section or extend choices in this field group.

sub_fields.label: Columns
sub_fields.name: grid_columns
sub_fields.instructions: Maximum 3 columns on large screens. Small screens use one column; medium widths step up gradually.

sub_fields.label: Card panel tint
sub_fields.name: card_panel_tint
sub_fields.instructions: Background tone behind each service featured image.

sub_fields.label: Footer CTAs
sub_fields.name: footer_ctas
sub_fields.instructions: Primary pill below the grid (e.g. View all designs).

sub_fields.label: Section background
sub_fields.name: section_background
sub_fields.instructions: White (default) or full-width navy behind the FAQ list and contact card.

sub_fields.label: Button label
sub_fields.name: cta_text
sub_fields.instructions: Shown on the wide navy pill. If empty, the link field’s title is used.

sub_fields.label: Trailing icon
sub_fields.name: trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional graphic on the right of the pill (e.g. circled arrow). Leave empty for the default arrow.

sub_fields.label: Badge
sub_fields.name: badge
sub_fields.instructions: Optional pill label above the headline (e.g. Alles inbegrepen).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main headline. Use line breaks for multi-line titles.

sub_fields.label: Highlight cards
sub_fields.name: cards
sub_fields.instructions: Three-up grid on large screens; stacks on mobile.

sub_fields.label: Card title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Use line breaks for two-line titles.

sub_fields.label: Card visual
sub_fields.name: visual
sub_fields.instructions: Optional glow panel artwork behind the lower portion of the card.

sub_fields.label: Badge
sub_fields.name: badge
sub_fields.instructions: Optional pill label above the headline (e.g. Onze beloften).

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Main headline. Use line breaks for multi-line titles.

sub_fields.label: CTAs
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: First row is shown as the primary button under the headline.

sub_fields.label: Center mockup image
sub_fields.name: mockup_image
sub_fields.instructions: Hero visual between copy and promise cards (e.g. phone mockup).

sub_fields.label: Promise cards
sub_fields.name: promise_items
sub_fields.instructions: Stacked cards on the right (short lines or short rich text).

sub_fields.label: Section title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Centered headline (Figma 696:4046).

sub_fields.label: “For you” card heading
sub_fields.name: for_you_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading above the checklist with brand check icons.

sub_fields.label: “For you” list icon
sub_fields.name: for_you_list_icon
sub_fields.instructions: One icon for all rows in this card (optional; default check glyph).

sub_fields.label: “For you” lines
sub_fields.name: for_you_list
sub_fields.instructions: Each row shows a brand check icon in the front end.

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” card heading
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading above the list with rose X icons.

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” list icon
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_list_icon
sub_fields.instructions: One icon for all rows in this card (optional; default X glyph).

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” lines
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_list
sub_fields.instructions: Each row shows a rose X icon in the front end.

sub_fields.label: Portrait image
sub_fields.name: portrait_image
sub_fields.instructions: Right column photo over the brand gradient.

sub_fields.label: Panel overlay (optional)
sub_fields.name: panel_overlay
sub_fields.instructions: Optional texture or rings over the gradient (e.g. Figma decorative layer).

sub_fields.label: Footer message
sub_fields.name: footer_message
sub_fields.instructions: Left copy in the navy footer band.

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA link
sub_fields.name: cta_link
sub_fields.instructions: White pill button (use link title for the label).

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: cta_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; defaults to circled arrow when empty.

sub_fields.label: Show featured post
sub_fields.name: show_featured
sub_fields.instructions: On page 1, a large featured block appears above the grid. If “Featured post” is set, that post is shown; otherwise the newest post in the list is featured. Remaining posts fill the grid.

sub_fields.label: Featured post
sub_fields.name: featured_post
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Pick one post to pin in the featured slot (page 1, no search). Choosing a new post replaces the previous selection. Leave empty to use the newest post automatically.

sub_fields.label: Posts per page
sub_fields.name: posts_per_page
sub_fields.instructions: Maximum posts returned from WordPress for each page (including the featured slot when enabled).

sub_fields.label: Read more link label (optional)
sub_fields.name: read_more_label
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to use the default label per site language.

sub_fields.label: Hero stats
sub_fields.name: hero_stats
sub_fields.instructions: Optional row of stat cards below the intro (e.g. four KPIs).

sub_fields.label: Show featured case study
sub_fields.name: show_featured
sub_fields.instructions: On page 1, a large featured block appears above the grid. If “Featured case study” is set, that entry is shown; otherwise the newest case study is featured.

sub_fields.label: Featured case study
sub_fields.name: featured_case_study
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Pin one case study in the featured slot (page 1, no search). Leave empty to use the newest automatically.

sub_fields.label: Hero KPI columns (large screens)
sub_fields.name: grid_columns
sub_fields.instructions: How many hero stat cards per row below the intro. Smaller breakpoints step up gradually. Does not change the case study card grid further down the page.

sub_fields.label: Case study list rows (per page)
sub_fields.name: grid_rows
sub_fields.instructions: How many rows of case studies to load per page. The card list uses three columns on large screens, so items per page = 3 × this value (maximum 50). The featured slot still uses one of the fetched items on page 1 when enabled.

sub_fields.label: Read more link label (optional)
sub_fields.name: read_more_label
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to use the default label per site language.

sub_fields.label: Intro badge
sub_fields.name: badge
sub_fields.instructions: Optional pill above the headline (e.g. Eerlijk en transparant).

sub_fields.label: Intro title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Large headline in the blue gradient strip.

sub_fields.label: Intro text
sub_fields.name: intro
sub_fields.instructions: Supporting copy in the gradient strip (white text).

sub_fields.label: Hero person image
sub_fields.name: hero_person_image
sub_fields.instructions: Cut-out portrait on the right of the blue band (PNG or WebP with transparency recommended). Appears over the decorative circle and may extend above/below the band.

sub_fields.label: Pricing cards
sub_fields.name: cards
sub_fields.instructions: Typically two columns: white card vs tinted panel.

sub_fields.label: Panel style
sub_fields.name: panel_style
sub_fields.instructions: White elevated card (left) vs light blue panel with white pills (right).

sub_fields.label: Feature lines
sub_fields.name: features
sub_fields.instructions: Icon + label rows (pill backgrounds follow panel style).

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional check or bullet artwork.

sub_fields.label: Price highlight
sub_fields.name: price_highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Main offer line (accent color in the frontend).

sub_fields.label: Price note
sub_fields.name: price_secondary
sub_fields.instructions: Optional guarantee or lock-in copy below the highlight.

sub_fields.label: Comparison / footer copy
sub_fields.name: price_footer
sub_fields.instructions: Optional muted comparison paragraph.

sub_fields.label: CTAs
sub_fields.name: ctas
sub_fields.instructions: First row renders as the pill button.

sub_fields.label: Problem card — title
sub_fields.name: problem_title
sub_fields.instructions: Large white heading on the navy card (e.g. Het probleem).

sub_fields.label: Problem card — body
sub_fields.name: problem_text
sub_fields.instructions: Intro + paragraphs (white text).

sub_fields.label: Problem card — portrait
sub_fields.name: problem_image
sub_fields.instructions: Cut-out / PNG with transparency; anchored bottom-right of the navy card.

sub_fields.label: Solution card — title
sub_fields.name: solution_title
sub_fields.instructions: Large white heading on the blue card (e.g. De oplossing).

sub_fields.label: Solution card — body
sub_fields.name: solution_text
sub_fields.instructions: Intro + benefit paragraphs (white text) above the checklist.

sub_fields.label: Solution card — checklist
sub_fields.name: solution_list
sub_fields.instructions: Optional rows with white disc + brand check (e.g. Google / local SEO lines).

sub_fields.label: Solution card — portrait
sub_fields.name: solution_image
sub_fields.instructions: Cut-out / PNG with transparency; anchored bottom-right of the blue card.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Centered headline above the two panels.

sub_fields.label: Left panel — body
sub_fields.name: left_body
sub_fields.instructions: Copy on the brand gradient card (white text).

sub_fields.label: Left panel — button link
sub_fields.name: left_link
sub_fields.instructions: Primary CTA on the gradient panel (e.g. plan a call).

sub_fields.label: Left panel — button trailing icon
sub_fields.name: left_button_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional icon at the end of the left CTA (replaces default arrow when set).

sub_fields.label: Left panel — bottom-right background graphic
sub_fields.name: left_corner_graphic
sub_fields.instructions: Optional artwork in the bottom-right of the blue gradient card (e.g. grid pattern). SVG/PNG with transparency recommended; fades toward the copy.

sub_fields.label: Right panel — body
sub_fields.name: right_body
sub_fields.instructions: Copy on the navy card (white text).

sub_fields.label: Right panel — top overlay graphic
sub_fields.name: right_overlay_graphic
sub_fields.instructions: Optional decorative strip over the top of the navy panel (e.g. wave vector).

sub_fields.label: Right panel — primary button link
sub_fields.name: right_primary_link
sub_fields.instructions: First action (e.g. view demo), brand-filled pill.

sub_fields.label: Right panel — secondary button link
sub_fields.name: right_secondary_link
sub_fields.instructions: Second action (e.g. download guide), white pill.

sub_fields.label: Right panel — primary button trailing icon
sub_fields.name: right_primary_button_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional trailing icon on the primary navy-card CTA.

sub_fields.label: Right panel — secondary button trailing icon
sub_fields.name: right_secondary_button_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional trailing icon on the secondary navy-card CTA.

sub_fields.label: Members
sub_fields.name: members
sub_fields.instructions: Up to 4 members supported on the frontend (Figma shows 2).

sub_fields.label: Accent
sub_fields.name: accent
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the social button and photo-circle accent (brand blue vs rose).

sub_fields.label: Background Wordmark (Optional)
sub_fields.name: background_wordmark
sub_fields.instructions: Optional large faint word behind the section (Figma: “THE TEAM”).

sub_fields.label: Background Overlay (Optional)
sub_fields.name: background_overlay
sub_fields.instructions: Optional bubble/grid overlay image (Figma background frame).

fields.label: Post lead (on-page intro)
fields.name: post_lead
fields.instructions: Optional intro under the title. When empty, the WordPress excerpt is used as plain text. Use this when the excerpt should stay short for SEO/cards but the article needs a longer lead.

fields.label: Breadcrumb parent (before Blog)
fields.name: breadcrumb_parent
fields.instructions: Optional first breadcrumb segment (e.g. “Educatie” or “Gratis tips”) before the Blog archive link.

fields.label: Show table of contents
fields.name: show_toc
fields.instructions: When off, the Inhoudsopgave block is hidden (author card still shows).

fields.label: Post Sections
fields.name: post_sections
fields.instructions: Optional sections below the blog content.

sub_fields.label: Section title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Centered headline (Figma 696:4046).

sub_fields.label: “For you” card heading
sub_fields.name: for_you_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading above the checklist with brand check icons.

sub_fields.label: “For you” list icon
sub_fields.name: for_you_list_icon
sub_fields.instructions: One icon for all rows in this card (optional; default check glyph).

sub_fields.label: “For you” lines
sub_fields.name: for_you_list
sub_fields.instructions: Each row shows a brand check icon in the front end.

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” card heading
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading above the list with rose X icons.

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” list icon
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_list_icon
sub_fields.instructions: One icon for all rows in this card (optional; default X glyph).

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” lines
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_list
sub_fields.instructions: Each row shows a rose X icon in the front end.

sub_fields.label: Portrait image
sub_fields.name: portrait_image
sub_fields.instructions: Right column photo over the brand gradient.

sub_fields.label: Panel overlay (optional)
sub_fields.name: panel_overlay
sub_fields.instructions: Optional texture or rings over the gradient (e.g. Figma decorative layer).

sub_fields.label: Footer message
sub_fields.name: footer_message
sub_fields.instructions: Left copy in the navy footer band.

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA link
sub_fields.name: cta_link
sub_fields.instructions: White pill button (use link title for the label).

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: cta_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; defaults to circled arrow when empty.

fields.label: Service Sections
fields.name: service_sections
fields.instructions: Optional extra sections below the core service intro.

fields.label: Project label
fields.name: case_study_project_label
fields.instructions: Shown above the title on overview cards and on the single template (e.g. “Project: Voetzorg Roermond”).

fields.label: Outcome metrics
fields.name: case_study_outcome_metrics
fields.instructions: Metrics for the overview featured block (first three used there) and for the **single case study** metrics bar (all rows, typically four).

fields.label: Case study lead (on-page intro)
fields.name: case_study_lead
fields.instructions: Optional intro under the title. When empty, the WordPress excerpt is shown as plain text (same idea as blog **Post lead**).

fields.label: Show table of contents
fields.name: show_toc
fields.instructions: When off, the Inhoudsopgave block is hidden (author card still shows).

fields.label: Breadcrumb parent (before case studies)
fields.name: breadcrumb_parent
fields.instructions: Optional first breadcrumb segment before the case studies archive link.

fields.label: Show related case studies
fields.name: show_related_case_studies
fields.instructions: When on, three other case studies load at the bottom of the single template.

fields.label: Featured form
fields.name: featured_form
fields.instructions: Optional Contact Form 7 form embedded after the article body (same pattern as blog posts).

fields.label: Case study sections
fields.name: case_study_sections
fields.instructions: Build the case study body here. When you add at least one of these layouts, the single template uses **sections** instead of the WordPress **Content** field (classic body stays available as a fallback when this list is empty). Use **Chapter** for each major block (Probleem, Oplossing, …); headings appear in the table of contents.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Shown as H2 and in the Inhoudsopgave (e.g. Probleem, Resultaat).

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Paragraphs under the heading.

sub_fields.label: Show divider under block
sub_fields.name: show_divider_after
sub_fields.instructions: Matches Figma hairline between story sections.

sub_fields.label: Title (optional)
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Shown above the image, left-aligned (e.g. section headline). Leave empty for image only.

sub_fields.label: Description (optional)
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Body copy below the screenshot (e.g. caption or supporting text).

sub_fields.label: Show divider under block
sub_fields.name: show_divider_after
sub_fields.instructions: Matches Figma hairline between story sections (same as Chapter).

sub_fields.label: Section heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to use the default (“Klantenrecensie” / “Client review”).

sub_fields.label: Video URL
sub_fields.name: video_url
sub_fields.instructions: YouTube or direct link; opens in a new tab with the poster as thumbnail.
